texto: Problems comes and goes that's why don't have to act like you own them, Million of human kind they have exact problems as yours, so how can you call them your problems.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a R- THE DON: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Problems comes and goes that's why don't have to act like you own them, Million of human kind the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, social, problems pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
